tuning: E A D G B E
content:
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                             Cheerleader (Felix Jaehn Remix) - OMI
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Tabbed by: JM
Be carefull with the rhythm ;) even if it is 4/4
( E ) originally not played


[Intro]

[tab][ch]E[/ch] ( [ch]E[/ch] ) [ch]B[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   (repeat)
(trumpet)[/tab]


[Verse 1]

[tab]( [ch]A[/ch] )        [ch]E[/ch]       ( [ch]E[/ch] )
      When I need motivation[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
      My one solution is my queen[/tab]
[tab]           ( [ch]E[/ch] )           [ch]B[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
'cause she' stay strong       yeah yeah[/tab]

[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]           ( [ch]E[/ch] )
she is always in my corner[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
right there   when I want her[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]             ( [ch]E[/ch] )
all these other girls are tempting[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]B[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
but I'm empty when you're gone and they say[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]

Do I make you feel like cheating?[/tab]
